data.current_description: Fetch and return the rendered HTML content of a webpage.
data.summary_suggestion: Fetch and convert webpage URL to HTML content
data.description_suggestion: Converts a webpage URL to its rendered HTML content. Accepts a URL as input and returns the fully rendered HTML markup of the page. Useful for capturing dynamic content that has been processed by the browser. Requires valid URL format and internet connectivity to the target domain.
data.reasoning: The original description is too brief and lacks important context for AI agents. data.current_summary: Generate an image from HTML/CSS or URL
data.current_description: Create an image by providing HTML/CSS content or a URL for screenshot capture.
data.description_suggestion: Converts HTML/CSS content or captures a website screenshot and returns a generated image. Accepts either raw HTML/CSS markup or a URL as input. Returns the image in the specified format (PNG, JPEG, WebP). Supports customization options for dimensions, quality, and rendering parameters.

Enhanced to clarify PDF output, available customization parameters (page settings, margins, orientation), and multi-page support for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Generate a PDF from HTML/CSS or URL
data.current_description: Create a PDF document from HTML/CSS content or a webpage URL.
data.description_suggestion: Converts HTML/CSS content or captures a webpage and generates a PDF document. Accepts either raw HTML/CSS markup or a URL as input. Returns a PDF file with configurable page settings including size, margins, orientation, and header/footer options. Supports multi-page document generation.

data.current_description: Create a chart image using Chart.js configuration.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate chart image from Chart.js configuration
data.description_suggestion: Generates a chart image from Chart.js configuration objects. Accepts Chart.js compatible configuration specifying chart type, data, labels, and styling options. Returns a rendered chart image in PNG, JPEG, or WebP format. Supports all Chart.js chart types including line, bar, pie, doughnut, radar, and polar area charts.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about input format and output. Improved summary to be more specific about Chart.js usage. Enhanced description to clarify input requirements (Chart.js config), supported chart types, and output formats for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Extract specific pages from a PDF. Max 200 pages per PDF.

data.current_description: Remove password protection from a PDF file. Maximum 10MB file size.
data.description_suggestion: Removes password protection from an encrypted PDF file, making it accessible without authentication. Requires the password-protected PDF file (max 10MB) and the correct password as input. Returns an unlocked PDF file with all restrictions removed. The original file remains unchanged; operation produces a new unprotected copy.
data.reasoning: Description mentions file size constraint but lacks critical input details (password requirement) and output clarification.
